strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background
Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work aligns with role
concerns: Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java exposure is dated
Cloud platform experience (AWS/GCP/Azure) only briefly noted via AWS CDK

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and thin Kotlin/cloud signal

response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years, deep TypeScript/Node.js experience, strong testing and craftsmanship discipline, and directly relevant current work on AI agents and MCP tooling. Gaps around Nest.js, Kotlin, and explicit cloud/Kubernetes depth are real but bridgeable given the breadth of stacks already mastered.
